overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character moves along wet streets past neon-lit buildings, crosses an intersection near a skyscraper marked '07', and continues beneath an elevated highway overpass in a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with public parking entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past palm trees and street lights, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'PUBLIC PARKING' with bright white and green neon lighting
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street against the night sky
tall street lights casting yellow-orange glow on the wet pavement
large concrete industrial building with minimal lighting on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in an urban commercial district at night. Palm trees line the left side while a public parking entrance with bright neon signage sits on the right. Street lamps cast reflections on the wet pavement as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with tall commercial buildings

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
passing the green and blue building with large '07' signage on top

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing along the street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated '07' sign near the top, teal and blue facade
retro-style diner with bright pink and green neon signage reading 'DRINK'
marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes on dark asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection at night, moving from the sidewalk onto the crosswalk. A prominent skyscraper marked with '07' dominates the skyline ahead, while a retro diner with bright neon signage appears on the right. Sparse vehicle traffic moves through the intersection as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the massive elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the overpass with concrete pillars lining both sides of the path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support beams and lighting
thick rectangular concrete pillars supporting the elevated roadway above
smooth concrete wall with circular drainage holes running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The environment becomes more enclosed with concrete support pillars and retaining walls replacing the open street. Artificial lighting from lamps mounted on the overpass structure illuminates the path ahead as the character continues walking through this urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that gradually transitions into a confined urban underpass. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and bright parking signage, where street lamps cast reflections across the wet pavement. As the character reaches an intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a wide crosswalk and a retro diner, with a massive skyscraper marked 07 dominating the skyline. The camera then follows the character across the street and beneath a heavy elevated highway overpass, where the open city view is replaced by concrete support pillars and retaining walls. Finally, the environment becomes a semi-covered corridor illuminated by artificial lamps mounted to the overhead structure.
